properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Precious blood has left me forgiven Pure like the whitest of snow Powerful to make sin and shame retreat This covenant is making me whole

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So I will rise And lift my head For by His mercy My life was spared The highest name Has set me free Because of Jesus My heart is clean

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Purify my heart in Your presence Teach me to discover the joy Oh holiness that forms as you draw me close In You what was lost is restored

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: So I will rise And lift my head For by His mercy My life was spared The highest name Has set me free Because of Jesus My heart is clean Because of Jesus My heart is clean
